headline: Is Oracle鈥檚 Debt Simply Too Much to Justify the Risk?
summary: Artificial intelligence has created an unusual investing environment. Companies willing to spend hundreds of billions of dollars building data centers are being rewarded with enormous growth expectations, while those sitting on the sidelines risk falling behind. The challenge is that AI infrastructure is expensive, and not every company has the balance sheet of Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT), ... Is Oracle鈥檚 Debt Simply Too Much to Justify the Risk?

headline: Markets Starting To Choke On Massive Surge In Debt Issuance
summary: Massive equity and AI-related debt issuance芒聙聰$236B YTD, projected $570B for 2026芒聙聰are straining credit markets. Read more on the market here.

headline: Capex boom threatens to crowd out buybacks, key equity demand driver
summary: Investing.com -- A surge in artificial intelligence-related capital spending is unlikely to undermine share buybacks across the broader U.S. equity market, according to a Deutsche Bank strategy note, which said record corporate earnings continue to support shareholder returns despite a sharp rise in investment spending.
